Villa Pizzo is a noble 17th-century residence built on the promontory of the Gulf of Cernobbio on Lake Como. Visible in its entirety only from the lake and famous for its elegance and breathtaking views, it is an ideal location for exclusive and refined weddings surrounded by centuries of Italian history and beauty.
